name: shopper-pp-mcp
description: The first CLI for Shopper — every catalog, cart, and delivery surface plus a local price/basket history the web app throws away each cycle.

shopper_cluster_id.title: SHOPPER_CLUSTER_ID
shopper_cluster_id.description: Sets SHOPPER_CLUSTER_ID for the Shopper MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

shopper_store_id.title: SHOPPER_STORE_ID
shopper_store_id.description: Sets SHOPPER_STORE_ID for the Shopper MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

shopper_token.title: SHOPPER_TOKEN
shopper_token.description: Sets SHOPPER_TOKEN for the Shopper MCP server.
